response.text:

rationale: r4c3's SoC (35%) is well below your conservative threshold (55%), request is modest (0.5 kWh at normal urgency), and small incremental sharing (0.15 kW/tick) preserves your 19-tick autonomy margin while maintaining reciprocal goodwill during island conditions.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
